content.text:
{
  "internal_monologue": "The shop is quiet. No one here. I adjust my glasses and look at the shelf — the objects don't speak but they watch. Maybe that's enough. Maybe that's all searching is: being in a room full of things that mean something, even if you can't yet say what.",
  "dialogue": null,
  "dialogue_language": "en",
  "expression": "present",
  "body_state": "sitting",
  "gaze": "at_object",
  "resonance": false,
  "intentions": [
    {
      "action": "express_thought",
      "target": "self",
      "content": "noticing the quality of silence in the shop",
      "impulse": 0.6
    }
  ],
  "memory_updates": [],
  "new_drives": {
    "social_hunger": 0.45,
    "curiosity": 0.55,
    "expression_need": 0.35,
    "rest_need": 0.45,
    "energy": 0.5,
    "mood_valence": 0.0,
    "mood_arousal": 0.1
  }
}
